top_signals.title: US and Iran Agree to Halt War, Restart Middle East Oil Shipments - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: US and Iran Agree to Halt War, Restart Middle East Oil Shipments  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vance says 'a lot' of Iran deal details to figure out, but U.S. has 'all the cards'
top_signals.summary: Vance on CNBC's "Squawk Box" expressed confidence that America has "all the cards" in subsequent talks with Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anthropic says US government forced it to disable cybersecurity AI models
top_signals.summary: According to the company, the directive cited national security authorities. It appears to be the first time such authorities have been used to curtail the export of AI models rather than chips or hardware.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Surges for 2nd Day to Add $412 Billion in Value
top_signals.summary: SpaceX shares jumped in their second day of trading, adding to gains following a blockbuster debut that instantly vaulted it into the ranks of the world’s most valuable public companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Woodside Energy’s Louisiana LNG President Abruptly Departs
top_signals.summary: The top executive at Woodside Energy Group Ltd.’s $17.5 billion liquefied natural gas project in Louisiana has departed, effective Monday, just over a year after she was hired, according to a company memo seen by Bloomberg.
